message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 40
  BoxPadding 20
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBorderThickness 1
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorFontColor black
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  BoxBorderColor #666666
  BoxFontColor black
  BoxBackgroundColor #9ACD32
  ArrowColor black
  MessageAlign left
}
hide footbox

actor Service as S
participant "Access token guard" as G

box "Auth microservice" #9ACD32
  participant "Session module" as SM
  participant "Auth module" as AM
end box

S -> G : request

activate G
G -> G : get headers
G -> G : check authentication header existence

alt [Authentication header is undefined]
  G --> S : 401
end

G -> G : get access token from header
G -> AM : validate access token
AM --> G : result of validation

alt [Access token is Invalid]
  G --> S : 401
end

G -> AM : get embedded client id from access token
AM -> AM : extract id

alt [Client id is missing]
  AM --> G : error
  G --> S : 401
end

AM --> G : client id
G -> G : modify request with client id
G --> S : modified request
deactivate G
@enduml
